body: This script: ```julia grid = LatitudeLongitudeGrid(size = (600, 600, 100), latitude = (-70, 70), longitude = (0,360), z = (-5000, 0)) bottom = regrid_bathymetry(grid; major_basins=1) mask = interior(bottom, :, :, 1); mask[mask .>= 0] .= NaN; mask[mask .< 0] .= 0; heatmap(mask) ``` ## On main ## On this branch

labels.description: When things aren't as smooth as expected
labels.name: bathymetry ⛰️

title: Fix major basin removals on Periodic longitudes
